data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Travel time between appointments', but the evidence provided does not include any specific data or API reads that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions travel time but does not provide concrete evidence of how this is tracked or validated in the system. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to assert that this requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the tracking or validation of travel time between appointments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
